summary: Scanned 73 files across .claude/, .github/, and .copilot/. Zero community template markers found (no awesome-claude, awesome-copilot, hesreallyhim, claude-starter-kit, cesium, 4DGS, or external repo URLs). Two legacy artifacts remain from the Ralph Wiggum PWA iteration: .github/copilot/copilot-instructions.md (Ralph Wiggum Protocol branding) and .github/copilot/hooks/copilot-hooks.json ([RALPH] hook prefixes). Both contain partially valid project logic but need rebranding to capegis. One security concern: .copilot/mcp-config.json contains hardcoded API keys. All other 71 files are fully project-aligned with Cape Town GIS stack references.
